events.text: Computed the two-leg sling tension from the diagram (2,000 lb load, 60° sling angle at the load): each leg carries (2,000/2)/sin(60°) ≈ **1,154.7 lb**, well within the 2,000 lb tagged WLL per leg and the angle-adjusted capacity of ~1,732 lb. Since 60° also clears the OSHA 1926.251 30° minimum, the configuration is compliant — written to `/app/answer.json` as `decision: pass`, `risk: low`.
